same_structure_label: Which option has the same labeled graph structure as the Reference, ignoring layout?
Choose the option whose labeled nodes and edges match the Reference graph exactly, regardless of placement.
Which option is structurally identical to the Reference graph when node positions are ignored?
Find the option with the same node labels and same edge connections as the Reference.
Which labeled option represents the same graph as the Reference?
contained_subgraph_label: Which option is contained in the Target Graph as a labeled subgraph?
Choose the option whose node labels and edges all appear inside the Target Graph.
Which option shows a labeled subgraph of the Target Graph?
Find the option where every shown node and edge is present in the Target Graph.
Which labeled option is fully contained within the Target Graph?

query:same_structure_label.json_output_contract: Use a valid JSON object with keys "annotation" and "answer" in that order for the final answer.
query:same_structure_label.json_output_contract_answer_only: Use a valid JSON object with key "answer" for the final answer.
query:same_structure_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the selected option panel
query:same_structure_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact option letter of the correct graph

query:contained_subgraph_label.json_output_contract: Use a valid JSON object with keys "annotation" and "answer" in that order for the final answer.
query:contained_subgraph_label.json_output_contract_answer_only: Use a valid JSON object with key "answer" for the final answer.
query:contained_subgraph_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the selected option panel
query:contained_subgraph_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact option letter of the correct graph

object_description.description: Generated description of the rendered reference/target graph and option panels.

code_prompt_defaults.object_description_undirected: a reference or target labeled graph above four labeled graph options
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_directed: a reference or target labeled directed graph above four labeled directed-graph options; arrow directions matter
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_same_structure_undire: a Reference labeled graph above four labeled graph options
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_same_structure_direct: a Reference labeled directed graph above four labeled directed-graph options; arrow directions matter
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_contained_subgraph_un: a Target Graph above four labeled graph options
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_contained_subgraph_di: a Target Graph above four labeled directed-graph options; arrow directions matter
